description: Composition Navy blue jeans with a washed look, made of 66% cotton and 34% polyester, has two insert pockets, two patch pockets on the back with embroidery detailing, double patch pocket detail on the right front pocket, comfortable waist with belt loops, brand patch on the waistband at the back and metal button and zipper closure on the front. Fit Slim fit; Regular rise Wash care Dry clean or machine wash separately in cold water as colour will bleed Use a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Dry flat inside out in shade Iron on reverse at medium setting only The manually treated denim with its lightly washed look adds edgy styling to this pair of jeans from denizen, while the fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. This pair stretches well to accommodate your body movements. Team it with a T-shirt and sneakers for a weekend coffee date or with a crisp white shirt and a structured blazer for a dressier look. Model statistics Product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
